summary.en-US: Keep your browser tabs organized with inbox zero methodology

description.en-US:
# Tabs Zero

Bring inbox zero methodology to your browser tabs! Automatically close idle tabs, detect duplicates, and keep your browsing focused.

## Features

- **Auto-expire idle tabs** with configurable time thresholds (15 min to 30+ days)
- **Smart duplicate detection** based on URL and title
- **Protection for important tabs** (pinned, active, playing audio)
- **Manual tab management** from popup (close individual tabs, switch to tabs)
- **Tree Style Tab integration** for advanced tab management
- **Detailed statistics** with helpful explanations

## Perfect For

- Heavy tab users who accumulate dozens of open tabs
- Researchers and developers who need organized browsing
- Anyone wanting to reduce memory usage and browser clutter
- Users of inbox zero methodology

## Privacy

Tabs Zero processes all data locally. No data is sent to external servers.
